description:
Add flatfile-specific checks to bd doctor when backend=flatfile.

Structural integrity:
- Every .json in issues/ parses as valid JSON
- Every issue has required fields (id, title, status)
- Issue ID in JSON matches filename (proj-abc.json contains id:proj-abc)
- No orphan comment dirs (comments/ entry with no matching issue)
- No orphan event files (events/ entry with no matching issue)
- counter.json parses and counter >= highest sequential ID on disk

Referential integrity:
- Every DependsOnID references an existing issue
- No dependency cycles (reuse DetectCycles)
- Parent-child deps: parent issue exists

Git tracking:
- .beads/issues/ not gitignored (reuse CheckGitignored)
- No untracked issue files (git status --porcelain .beads/issues/)

Implementation: add a flatfile check group in cmd/bd/doctor/ that runs when configfile.GetBackend() == flatfile. Skip Dolt-specific checks.
title: bd doctor: flatfile backend health checks
